context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the write-yard-docs instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when documenting Ruby classes and public methods with YARD.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: All YARD text must be in English unless user explicitly requests otherwise.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Task lists from generate-tasks MUST include explicit YARD sub-tasks after implementation.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use `@option` for every valid key in hash params. Include at least one `@example` on `.call` or the main public entry point.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run validation before considering documentation complete:
